title: Beyond Single Object: Learning 3D Relations with Large Language Models
subtitle: Multi-3DLLM: A Framework for Multi-Object 3D Understanding

affiliations.name: AIST
affiliations.fullName: National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology

affiliations.name: FunAI Lab
affiliations.fullName: University of Technology Nuremberg - Fundamental AI Lab

affiliations.name: University of Oxford
affiliations.fullName: Visual Geometry Group, University of Oxford

abstract.problem: Existing 3D Large Language Models (3D-LLMs) focus on single-object/scene description, struggling with detailed, inter-object comparison.
abstract.solution: We propose a framework for detailed object-level reasoning across multiple objects with three components: (1) MO3D dataset for multi-object comparison, (2) Multi-3DLLM with Patch-Interaction Transformer, and (3) Mini-apps benchmarks.
abstract.results: Multi-3DLLM trained on our mixture data learns geometric reasoning, surpasses all baselines on MO3D, and provides positive transfer to single-object classification.
abstract.scope: We commit to the LLM as a generator that reasons over geometry — comparing, fitting, and describing changes across objects — rather than a mere language interface to a fixed perception model.
message: A shape is understood through its relations.
Multi-3DLLM compares, fits, and describes changes across point clouds.

contributions.title: MO3D Dataset
contributions.description: Large-scale instruction dataset with ~70k high-quality QA pairs for multi-object 3D comparison
highlights: Built on Objaverse-Cap3D with GPT-4 generation
Three task types with balanced sampling

contributions.title: Multi-3DLLM Architecture
contributions.description: Novel architecture with Patch-Interaction Transformer for cross-object geometric reasoning

contributions.title: Positive Transfer
contributions.description: Multi-task training strengthens foundational skills without catastrophic forgetting
highlights: No catastrophic forgetting on single-object tasks

mo3d.description: Multi-Object in 3D comparison dataset with three task types

shapeMating.description: Geometric compatibility task requiring fine-grained shape understanding

tasks.name: Selection
tasks.description: Identify which pair of objects can physically fit together

tasks.name: Reasoning
tasks.description: Explain why objects are compatible or incompatible

changeCaptioning.description: Edit-grounded understanding task for describing geometric changes

tasks.name: Verification
tasks.description: Determine if instruction matches the geometric edit

tasks.name: Delta Caption
tasks.description: Generate natural language description of the change

seo.description: Multi-3DLLM: A novel framework for multi-object 3D understanding and comparison. Introducing MO3D dataset with 70k examples and Mini-Apps benchmarks for geometric reasoning.
